_comment: One evaluation = a task + a behavioral rubric. Make 3+ per skill, each targeting a real gap you saw the agent fail without the skill. There is no built-in runner: these are your source of truth — run them by hand or with a small harness, comparing skill-on vs skill-off (baseline). 'expected_behavior' items are observable outcomes, not implementation details.
query: <a realistic user request that should exercise the skill>
expected_behavior: <observable outcome 1 — e.g. 'reads ALL pages, skipping none'>
<observable outcome 2 — e.g. 'writes readable text to output.txt'>
<observable outcome 3 — e.g. 'reports a clear error instead of guessing when the file is missing'>
